## Safety

- [ ] No API keys, tokens, `.env`, `auth.json`, private `~/.hermes`, memories, or chat logs are included.
- [ ] Local Ollama fallback is not enabled by default.
- [ ] Docs were updated if user-facing behavior changed.

## Validation

- [ ] Bash syntax checks
- [ ] Python compile check
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Secret pattern scan
